title: Making invitations
subtitle: Invite someone simply.
overview: Read the English aloud, understand the Chinese, then answer with your own real information.

sections.title: A1 focus
rows: Do you want to have coffee?
Would you like to go for a walk?
Would you like to have coffee?
I would love to, but I am busy today.
我很愿意，但我今天很忙。

items.en: Do you want to have coffee?
Would you like to go for a walk?
Would you like to have coffee?
I would love to, but I am busy today.
items.zh: 我很愿意，但我今天很忙。

items.en: Now make one sentence about your real life.
items.zh: 现在造一个关于你真实生活的句子。

items.en: Read it aloud three times: slow, clear, natural.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Would you like to have coffee?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I would love to, but I am busy today.
lines.zh: 我很愿意，但我今天很忙。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say it one more time, slowly?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I would love to, but I am busy today.
lines.zh: 我很愿意，但我今天很忙。

items.en: Do you want to have coffee?
Would you like to go for a walk?
Change one word and say it again.
Use the sentence today if you can.
items.zh: 如果可以，今天就使用这个句子。
